stories.title: RBC Heritage Preview — Scheffler the Clear Favorite as 82-Player Field Descends on Harbour Town (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Rory McIlroy just won the Masters. He's not playing this week.

That leaves Scottie Scheffler as the clear No. 1 favorite (+350) at Harbour Town, a course where he's already a champion.

RBC Heritage tees off TOMORROW. $20M on the line. #GolfFanrecap #RBCHeritage #PGATour

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The 2026 RBC Heritage field at Harbour Town:

💰 $20 million purse
🏌 82-player field
📍 Smallest greens on the PGA Tour
🎯 Scottie Scheffler: clear favorite

McIlroy is out. Who wins it? #GolfFanrecap #RBCHeritage #PGATour

article.headline: RBC Heritage 2026 Preview: Without McIlroy, Scheffler Leads a Stacked 82-Player Field to Harbour Town

stories.title: McIlroy's Masters Legacy — Back-to-Back Titles, First Repeat Since Tiger (NEW STORY)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Rory McIlroy just became the first player since Tiger Woods (2001-02) to win back-to-back Masters titles.

He blew a SIX-SHOT LEAD at the halfway point.

Then won by one shot at -12.

That's a champion. #GolfFanrecap #TheMasters #RoryMcIlroy

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Three players have ever won back-to-back Masters titles:

Jack Nicklaus (twice)
Tiger Woods (2001-02)
Rory McIlroy (2025-26)

That list. #GolfFanrecap #TheMasters #Golf

article.headline: Rory McIlroy Makes History at Augusta: First Player Since Tiger to Win Back-to-Back Masters

stories.title: LIV Golf Mexico City Preview — DeChambeau Hunts Unprecedented Third Straight Title (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Bryson DeChambeau won the last two LIV Golf individual titles.

He's back this week in Mexico City — the highest-altitude course on the circuit — chasing an unprecedented third straight title.

LIV Golf Mexico City: April 16-19. #GolfFanrecap #LIVGolf #BrysonDeChambeau

article.headline: LIV Golf Mexico City Preview: DeChambeau Chases Unprecedented Third Straight Individual Title at Chapultepec

stories.title: LPGA JM Eagle LA Championship — World's Top Two Out, Hyo Joo Kim Leads the Field (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
World No. 1 Jeeno Thitikul: OUT.
World No. 2 Nelly Korda: OUT.

The LPGA's JM Eagle LA Championship — the final event before the Chevron Championship major — tips off tomorrow with a wide-open field.

Hyo Joo Kim leads it. Who wins? #GolfFanrecap #LPGA #LadiesGolf

article.headline: No Korda, No Thitikul: LPGA's JM Eagle LA Championship Opens Wide as Chevron Approaches

stories.title: Scheffler's RBC Heritage Redemption — Can the World No. 1 Bounce Back at Harbour Town? (NEW STORY)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Scottie Scheffler's 2026 so far: four top-4 finishes, including a Masters runner-up on Sunday.

Tomorrow he tees up at Harbour Town — a course he WON in 2024.

He's +350. The next closest is +1450.

Golf world expects him to win here. #GolfFanrecap #RBCHeritage #ScottieScheffler

article.headline: Scheffler at Harbour Town: The World No. 1 Has Something to Prove — and a Perfect Course to Do It
